name: orive
description: Orive Creative Studio, a friendly creative studio you can install into Claude Code, the desktop app, and Cowork.

plugins.name: orive-creative-studio
plugins.description: The host and all the specialists: brand, content, ads, pricing, research, the creative crew, hospitality, and fashion, plus a built-in analyst that diagnoses problems and recommends the crew, their skills, and the connection wizard.
